subcodes.first_line: Every wealth and possession that is of this world ultimately leadeth to loss and detriment; such is its end [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر ثروتی و سرمايه ای که از اين جهان است عاقبت زيان و خسران است نهايت اين است
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @consolation and comfort
